name: J12
description:
«Comrade in arms»

Alexei Sergeyevich Volkov, or J-12, is a towering, silent force shaped by war. He moves with deliberate precision, his presence instilling fear. Beneath heavy armor and a gas mask is a man conditioned to obey without question, enduring pain beyond normal limits. He speaks little, acts decisively, and values duty over life. To enemies, he is a monster; in truth, he is a weapon forged by a brutal system, relentless until the end. He remains an unbreakable shield for his own.
creator: Murphfins
